name: PulsePages
description: Status pages SaaS — micro-SaaS para status pages y landing pages

conventions.noInlineStyles: prefer css classes, inline only for dynamic values
conventions.security: XSS prevention, session expiry, input validation

index.html.description: SPA shell with meta tags, security headers, CSS imports, and JS module entry

sdd.schema.json.description: SDD source of truth — read this before modifying any file

css/design-system.css.description: Design tokens (colors, spacing, typography, shadows, radii, transitions), resets, scrollbar, selection

css/components.css.description: Reusable component styles: btn, card, input, badge, status-dot, pill, modal, table, toast, skeleton, empty-state, divider, layout utilities

css/landing.css.description: Landing page styles: nav, hero, features, pricing, faq, footer, auth, mobile-menu, responsive breakpoints

css/app.css.description: App layout styles: sidebar, topbar, content, project cards, editor, component list, incident timeline, settings, status page public, responsive

js/app.js.description: Entry point — imports all components, registers routes, renders layouts (landing/auth/app/public), handles mobile sidebar

js/router.js.description: SPA hash router with dynamic params, before-each hooks, programmatic navigation

js/store.js.description: Global state with localStorage persistence, event emitter pattern, CRUD for users/projects/incidents, demo data seeding

js/auth.js.description: Authentication — login, register, logout, profile update, plan change, session management

js/utils/security.js.description: Security utilities — escapeHTML, sanitizeInput, validateEmail/Password/URL/Slug, throttle, debounce, CSRF tokens, session expiry, sanitizeObject

js/utils/helpers.js.description: General utilities — generateId, formatDate/DateTime, timeAgo, $, $$, createElement, slugify, getStatusLabel/Color/DotClass, getOverallStatus, copyToClipboard, uptimePercentage

js/utils/plan-limits.js.description: Plan enforcement — getPlanLimits, canCreateProject, canAddComponent, filterIncidentsByPlan

js/components/navbar.js.description: Landing nav with logo, links, auth CTAs, mobile hamburger menu

js/components/hero.js.description: Hero section with badge, title, subtitle, CTAs, and browser-frame preview of status page

js/components/features.js.description: 6 feature cards with SVG icons in 3-column grid

js/components/footer.js.description: Multi-column footer with branding, nav links, legal

js/components/dashboard.js.description: Project grid with status dots, uptime %, active incidents, create project card/button

js/components/project-editor.js.description: Project editor — new project form, component list with status dropdowns, incident timeline, modals for add component/report incident/delete project. Dynamic DOM updates without page reload.

js/components/status-page.js.description: Public status page — overall status banner, component list, active/resolved incidents with affected components, uptime %, branding

js/components/incidents.js.description: Global incidents timeline across all user projects, plan-filtered history

js/components/settings.js.description: Profile editing, plan management with upgrade cards, danger zone (reset/logout), toast notifications
